mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_hearing WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY noise_level DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_hearing WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_hearing WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_hearing WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_hearing (worker_name, department, noise_level, exposure_hours, right_4k, right_6k, left_4k, left_6k, sts_result, ppe_type, ppe_nrr, exam_date, exam_type, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{noiseLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{exposureHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{right4k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{right6k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{left4k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{left6k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stsResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ppeType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ppeNrr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{examType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_hearing SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, noise_level = #{noiseLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exposure_hours = #{exposureHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, right_4k = #{right4k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, right_6k = #{right6k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, left_4k = #{left4k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, left_6k = #{left6k,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sts_result = #{stsResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ppe_type = #{ppeType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ppe_nrr = #{ppeNrr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exam_date = #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, exam_type = #{examType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_hearing SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
